basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially announced the Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification has been published under Advt No. JIP/EM&T/F-MA/ICMR-INDIA EMS Project/2026/N03E on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 28 years and hold a qualification of 10th pass with Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician / Medical Laboratory Technician along with two years of experience can submit their applications through Email mode on or before 29 July 2026. Direct link

qualification.education_qualification: 10th with Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician / Medical Laboratory Technician with two years experience
qualification.details: 10th with Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician / Medical Laboratory Technician with two Years' experience in relevant subject/field. Good Command on Tamil & English Speaking, Reading & Writing.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JIPMER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Technical Support – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER Project Technical Support – I posts is 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support – I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Technical Support – I position by JIPMER.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Project Technical Support – I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10th grade with a Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician or Medical Laboratory Technician, along with two years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support – I position is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support – I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 21,600/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JIPMER Project Technical Support – I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection methods for the Project Technical Support – I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Does JIPMER offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age relaxation details for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for easy access.
